title: Celestial Performance
description: Celestial Performance is a modpack designed to enhance your experience by boosting your FPS
body:
![Celestial Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55c1d21b201004fa3aeeee0d2ab3487382fd8d31.png)

[![Available for fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)]( https://modrinth.com/modpack/celestial-perfomance/versions?l=fabric)
[![Available for forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/celestial-perfomance/versions?l=forge)


### **⚠️WARNING:** Use Mouse Tweaks mod at your own risk
**The Mouse Tweaks mod is installed. Using this mod on some PvP servers may result in a ban. You risk being deleted from the server if this mod is discovered and its use violates the specific rules of the server. Always check the server's banned mod list before joining. Or uninstall the mod.**


Celestial Performance is a modpack designed to make your game better by boosting your FPS. The modpack is specifically designed to enhance performance.

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

> ### **This modpack has a bunch of mods that gives you performance like**
> - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
> - [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
> - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
> - [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)
> - [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
> - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
> - [Very Many Players]([https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric/version/0.2.0+beta.7.198+1.21.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric/version/0.2.0+beta.7.198+1.21.5))
###    **And so much more**

</details>


**My main focus is the newer versions of Minecraft.**

This modpack offers better FPS. While it may fix some bugs, the main goal is optimization, so don’t expect bug fixes for Minecraft with each modpack update. This modpack also includes extra features you might like, such as installing shaders and resource packs in Minecraft with a click of a button.

Every modpack I release has been tested (by me). So if your game crashes, the issue might be because of your computer or because you updated the modpack/mods in the modpack when you were not supposed to. Occasionally, certain mods may be unstable in the version you're downloading. If I find a fix for a mod not working, I'll update the description with instructions on how to resolve it.
Older versions equal fewer mods. **And if you want to request versions of minecraft or mod loaders, go to this website: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScw_qSE-vhHHEaFNCuIlVwAHrM530-mSJXJobapQyXMQBCNYA/viewform?usp=dialog**
